calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff, Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Ocean Family Co., Inc., Kevin Young Ho Hong or Kang M. Hong.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 25, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Ocean Family Co., Inc., Kevin Young Ho Hong and Kang M. Hong as follows:

Damages/Principal - $90,764.89.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,438.40.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $463.17, for a total judgment in the amount of $98,166.46.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Off Calendar
